title: Medical HIPAA-Aware Extension
summary: Privacy and audit constraints for AAEP in US healthcare contexts
description: Adds HIPAA-aware PHI redaction rules, Business Associate Agreement (BAA) capability negotiation, medical-domain risk classification, audit metadata aligned with HL7 standards, and medical-specific critical event subtypes. Does not by itself make a system HIPAA-compliant; provides protocol-layer building blocks.

event_types.name: aaep:agent.medical.alert
event_types.description: Clinical-significance alert (drug interaction, abnormal lab, allergy)

event_types.name: aaep:agent.medical.override_required
event_types.description: Agent requires credentialed override to proceed

capability_fields.name: ext_medical_hipaa.baa_in_force
capability_fields.description: Whether a BAA is in force between producer and subscriber

helper_functions.redact_phi: Apply PHI redaction patterns to a string
helper_functions.classify_medical_risk: Return risk assessment for a medical tool name
helper_functions.audit_metadata_for: Build a standards-aligned audit metadata block
helper_functions.hash_patient_identifier: Hash an MRN or similar patient ID for audit logs

compliance_disclaimer: This extension is informational and does not constitute legal or compliance advice. Operators MUST consult qualified counsel before clinical deployment.
